one_time_description: Income from investments in First Nations Enterprises - large non-recurring equity pickup from government business enterprises
economic_notes: Lake Babine Nation operates multiple government business enterprises including Burns Lake Native Development Corporation, Fort Babine Lake Property Ltd., Gramma's House Society, Lake Babine Economic Development Society, Lake Babine Nation Forestry Limited Partnership, Lake Babine Nation Forestry Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures LP, Nis'Ina Development Corporation, Nedut'een Development Corp., Talok Fisheries Limited Partnership, Talok Fisheries Ltd., and 1203001 B.C. Ltd. Significant interest income of $3,141,479 earned on short-term deposits.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to unaudited financial information for government business enterprises accounted for under the modified equity method - auditors unable to determine if adjustments to investment balances or accumulated surplus are necessary. Large income from First Nations Enterprises of $7,633,100 recognized as other item in 2024 vs nil in 2023. Significant increase in accounts receivable ($61M vs $11M prior year) and deferred revenue ($75M vs $41M prior year). Total government transfers calculated as Federal ($27,605,552) + Provincial ($9,924,385) = $37,529,937. OSR includes Band Generated, Miscellaneous, First Nations Gaming, Interest income, Transfer from deferred revenue, Other Aboriginal Groups, and Investment income. Forgiveness of debt $126,585 also recognized as other item. 13 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method.
